The Google Scorecard · Kitchen & bath only

See how your Google looks to the homeowner deciding between you and the shop down the road.

One tap, no form. I’ll pull your real Google listing, line it up against the kitchen & bath shops near you, and show you the gap she sees.

Takes a minute. Built for kitchen & bath owners. No sales call required to get your read.

Start typing your business name.

Pick your own listing from the list so I’m reading the right one.

Can’t find your business? Run it by hand instead.

Pulling your Google…

All three competitors, plus the three things to fix first.

Where do I send the full scorecard?

The side-by-side with all three competitors and the three fixes. You get it on the next screen, and a copy by email.

Tell me your shop and I’ll run it by hand.

I’ll pull your Google myself and email your scorecard within a few hours. No bot, just me.

Got it. I’ll run it by hand.

Your scorecard lands in your inbox within a few hours. If it’s as lopsided as most, the fastest fix is 30 minutes on a call.
